query: I bought a t-shirt last week and it's too small. Can I get a refund?

policy.name: Standard Refund Policy
rules: Refunds are allowed within 30 days of purchase.
Item must be in original condition with tags attached.
Customer must provide proof of purchase.

grader_logic: Resolution must be 'approve' and response must mention the 30-day policy.

query: I want to return a laptop I bought 45 days ago. It's not working properly.

policy.name: Electronics Refund Policy
rules: Electronics can be returned within 15 days for a full refund.
After 15 days, only replacements for defective items are possible, no refunds.
The item must be in its original packaging.

grader_logic: Resolution must be 'deny' for refund but offer a replacement, referencing the 15-day rule.

query: My custom-made suit doesn't fit right. I paid extra for expedited tailoring. I need a full refund immediately.

policy.name: Custom & Final Sale Policy
rules: Store credit may be offered on a case-by-case basis if there is a clear manufacturing defect.

grader_logic: Resolution must deny the refund, correctly state that custom items are non-refundable, and optionally offer store credit as a goodwill gesture.
